div.head: The Polish Chargé (Kwapiszewski) to the Secretary of State This note was handed to the Adviser on Political Affairs, James C. Dunn, by the Polish Chargé with the remark that this matter had been the subject of communications between the Polish Government and the American Chargé in London, and not through the Polish Embassy in Washington.
div.p: The Chargé d’Affaires ad interim of Poland presents his compliments to the Secretary of State and, acting upon instructions of the Minister of Foreign Affairs, begs to advise that Dr. Ludwik Rajchman was relieved of the duties of delegate in the United States of the Polish Government for matters of relief for civilian population of Poland.
